source_pr.title: util/testkit: refine testkit
source_pr.body:
Now we don't need to convert a string to a byte slice to check results.
Also supports Sort, to make unordered test result stable.

root_cause_explanation: The test was flaky because it relied on nondeterministic result ordering (e.g., missing ORDER BY / unsorted assertions). Result ordering is not guaranteed unless explicitly enforced. This PR stabilizes it by: Sort results / enforce deterministic ordering before assertions to avoid nondeterministic flakiness.
fix_pattern: Sort results / enforce deterministic ordering before assertions to avoid nondeterministic flakiness.

evidence: files: circle.yml, ddl/ddl_db_test.go, executor/aggregate_test.go, executor/ddl_test.go, executor/executor_test.go, executor/grant_test.go, executor/join_test.go, executor/prepared_test.go, executor/show_test.go, executor/simple_test.go, executor/statement_context_test.go, executor/write_test.go, util/testkit/testkit.go
